builderCode:
# 1D arrays in all four directions
right = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30, 40, 50], position=(1, 1), direction='right')
down  = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30], position=(1, 8), direction='down')
left  = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30, 40, 50], position=(5, 8), direction='left')
up    = Array(arr=[10, 20, 30], position=(6, 12), direction='up')

# 2D uniform grid
grid = Array2D(
    arr=[[1, 2, 3],
         [4, 5, 6],
         [7, 8, 9]],
    position=(1, 15),
    var_name='grid'
)

# 2D jagged — rectangular=True (default): pad short rows with empty cells
jagged_rect = Array2D(
    arr=[[1, 2, 3],
         [4, 5],
         [6]],
    position=(6, 15),
    var_name='jagged (rect)',
    color=(100, 180, 100)
)

# 2D jagged — rectangular=False: only draw cells that exist in the data
jagged_clip = Array2D(
    arr=[[1, 2, 3],
         [4, 5],
         [6]],
    position=(6, 19),
    var_name='jagged (clip)',
    rectangular=False,
    color=(100, 150, 220)
)
